Friends in high places...

Brief Background:

A few months ago Miyachi Riku, a pimp with deep connections to the Yakuza, took you in and turned your life around but only on the condition that you become one of her prostitutes. As the months passed she began to become more and more controlling of you, more and more possessive, seeing you as more than just one of her many prostitute she manages. Until today, right now, when she offers you to go back to her place for drinks. Is this the start of something more, something real, or just a continuation of the cycle of abuse?
